svg.text: PLATE 13D · ARABIC · RUNNING TEXT
Quran passages · classical prose · interlinear · bridge phrase · read right to left
read right to left · Arabic above · transliteration middle · translation below
— · — BISMILLAH · OPENING OF THE QURAN — · —
بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
Bismillahi r-rahmani r-rahim
In the name of God the Most Gracious the Most Merciful
Note: rahmani = the Gracious · rahim = the Merciful · both from root R-H-M (mercy)
— · — AL-FATIHA 1:2 · PRAISE TO GOD — · —
الحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
al-hamdu lillahi rabb-il-'alamin
Praise be to God Lord of all the worlds
Note: al-hamdu = the praise · rabbil-'alamin = Lord of worlds · dual/plural distinction key
— · — QURAN 2:255 · AYAT AL-KURSI · VERSE OF THE THRONE — · —
اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الحَيُّ القَيُّومُ
Allahu la ilaha illa huwa al-hayyu al-qayyum
God - there is no deity except Him - the Ever-Living the Sustainer
Note: la ilaha illa = no god but · al-hayyu = the Living · al-qayyum = the Sustainer (of all)
— · — HADITH · SEEK KNOWLEDGE — · —
اطلبوا العلم ولو بالصين
utlubu al-'ilma wa-law bi-s-sin
Seek knowledge even if it is in China
Note: utlubu = seek (imperative pl.) · 'ilm = knowledge · wa-law = even if · classical saying
— · — THE BRIDGE PHRASE · IN ARABIC — · —
هذا صُنِعَ لَكَ بِلا مُقَابِل مِنْ قِبَلِ أناسٍ تَذَكَّرُوا للأمَام
hadha suni'a laka bila muqabil min qibali anasin tadhakkarou lil-amam
this was made for you without price by people who remembered toward what is ahead
Note: lil-amam = toward the front/future · tadhakkarou = they remembered · min qibali = by/from
REMEMBER FORWARD · THE PATIENT MESSAGE · CC BY-SA 4.0 · rememberforward.org
THIS IS A PATIENT MESSAGE. IT WAS MADE FOR YOU, FREELY, BY PEOPLE WHO REMEMBERED FORWARD.
BUY IT · BUILD IT · BURY IT · FOR SOMEONE YOU WILL NEVER MEET
